text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's summer, yes, but she's definitely not on break.
Summer camp is an important event that helps
runners improve. The thing is...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, bestie! This summer is gonna be lit! ☆
Let's go find our new selves, girl! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Today's day one of our second lives!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer, the season of starting anew. Mejiro
Palmer seems to be planning to use this as a
chance to reinvent herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her plan? To transform herself into a brand-new
Palmer who bravely ventures forward without
fearing failure.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Palmster, since you're a Mejiro, I bet you've
been told you were gonna be a racer ever since
you were a kid, right?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Is that really your dream, though? Is there
anything else you've wanted to do?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Other than running? Now that you mention it...
Hmm.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: There are plenty of Umamusume who don't pursue racing careers. Is that legit an option?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Like would it actually be okay to explore other
fields? This late in the game?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh... So this is purely hypothetical, but like...
Would you still think that? Even if I found some
other passion and left racing entirely?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I pause to think before answering.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she really wants to restart her life, then she'll
have to determine what she really longs for,
without any pretenses or deflections.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna try a bunch of stuff and see
what I really like this summer! So...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You'd better be there for me, besties! Let's live it
up and have the time of our lives this summer!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I'm in! ☆ You can take on the Hakodate Kinen in
vacation mode too, then! Let's make sure to get
in some sightseeing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like they're putting fun above all else.
There's no doubt in my mind Mejiro Palmer will
find out what she likes by the end of this trip.
